transcript.text: Morning, it's the, uh, this is a vlog, this is the morning of the 17th, this is a vlog for the 16th of November 2013 because I didn't get around to do vlog last night and I just, I was too preoccupied, I was working on trying to condense these, uh, on my Kindle book page, uh, it's super like, um, um, detailed, like on some of the books, I would have like the title of like each and every page,
